title: Senior Software Engineer
description:
**Job Description**

**Senior Software Engineer (Java Full stack)
   

  

 Pune**
  

  

  

**About the Job**



* We are seeking a highly skilled Senior Full Stack Developer with strong expertise in Java and Angular to join our dynamic team
* The ideal candidate will have experience building scalable, secure, and high\\-performing applications, with additional knowledge of PL/SQL,
* PostgreSQL, and Snowflake as desirable skills
* This role requires excellent communication skills, a collaborative mindset, and hands\\-on experience with DevOps practices,
* GitHub, and Agile methodologies using Jira



**Responsibilities:**



* Design, develop, and maintain full\\-stack applications using Java (Spring Boot) and Angular
* Develop responsive and user\\-friendly UI components using Angular, ensuring cross\\-browser compatibility and optimal performance
* Implement and optimize database solutions using PL/SQL and PostgreSQL; exposure to Snowflake is a plus
* Collaborate with cross\\-functional teams to deliver high\\-quality software solutions in an Agile environment
* Participate in code reviews, ensure best practices, and maintain high standards of software quality
* Work closely with DevOps teams to manage CI/CD pipelines and deployments
* Utilize GitHub for version control and contribute to branching strategies and workflow improvements
* Communicate effectively with stakeholders and team members to ensure clarity and alignment on requirements and deliverables


**Qualifications**

**Must Have:**



* 7\\-10 years of experience in software development with strong expertise in Java, Spring, and Angular
* Solid understanding of RESTful APIs, microservices architecture, and front\\-end frameworks
* Hands\\-on experience with PL/SQL and PostgreSQL; familiarity with Snowflake is a plus
* Strong knowledge of DevOps tools and practices, including CI/CD pipelines
* Proficiency with GitHub for source control and collaboration
* Experience working in Agile teams and using Jira for project tracking
* Excellent problem\\-solving skills and ability to work independently and in a team environment
* Excellent debugging skills across UI and backend layers
* Strong verbal and written communication skills



**Good to have:**



* Exposure to cloud platforms Azure
* Knowledge of containerization (Docker, Kubernetes)
* Experience with performance tuning and security best practices


**Additional Information**
* Opportunity to work on cutting\\-edge technologies and challenging projects
* Collaborative and inclusive work culture
* Competitive compensation and benefits



**Our Benefits**



* Flexible working environment
* Volunteer time off
* LinkedIn Learning
* Employee\\-Assistance\\-Program (EAP)



 NIQ may utilize artificial intelligence (AI) tools at various stages of the recruitment process, including résumé screening, candidate assessments, interview scheduling, job matching, communication support, and certain administrative tasks that help streamline workflows. These tools are intended to improve efficiency and support fair and consistent evaluation based on job\\-related criteria. All use of AI is governed by NIQ’s principles of fairness, transparency, human oversight, and inclusion. Final hiring decisions are made exclusively by humans. NIQ regularly reviews its AI tools to help mitigate bias and ensure compliance with applicable laws and regulations. If you have questions, require accommodations, or wish to request human review were permitted by law, please contact your local HR representative. For more information, please visit NIQ’s AI Safety Policies and Guiding Principles: https://nielseniq.com/global/en/info/niqs\\-ai\\-safety\\-policies/
   

  




  


**About NIQ**




 NIQ is the world’s leading consumer intelligence company, delivering the most complete understanding of consumer buying behavior and revealing new pathways to growth. In 2023, NIQ combined with GfK, bringing together the two industry leaders with unparalleled global reach. With a holistic retail read and the most comprehensive consumer insights—delivered with advanced analytics through state\\-of\\-the\\-art platforms—NIQ delivers the Full View™. NIQ is an Advent International portfolio company with operations in 100\\+ markets, covering more than 90% of the world’s population.
   

  





 For more information, visit NIQ.com
   

  





 Want to keep up with our latest updates?
   

  





 Follow us on: LinkedIn \\| Instagram \\| Twitter \\| Facebook
   

  




  


**Our commitment to Diversity, Equity, and Inclusion**




 At NIQ, we are steadfast in our commitment to fostering an inclusive workplace that mirrors the rich diversity of the communities and markets we serve. We believe that embracing a wide range of perspectives drives innovation and excellence. All employment decisions at NIQ are made without regard to race, color, religion, sex (including pregnancy, sexual orientation, or gender identity), national origin, age, disability, genetic information, marital status, veteran status, or any other characteristic protected by applicable laws. title: Software Developer
description:
**About The Company**
 JioHotstar is a leading digital entertainment and technology company committed to delivering innovative content and cutting\\-edge solutions to millions of users across India and beyond. As part of the Jio ecosystem, JioHotstar specializes in providing a comprehensive platform that combines live sports, movies, TV shows, and personalized content experiences. The company is renowned for its focus on technological excellence, user\\-centric design, and creating an engaging digital environment that caters to diverse audience preferences. With a mission to redefine entertainment through technology, JioHotstar continually invests in advanced infrastructure and innovative features to stay ahead in the competitive digital landscape.
   

  

**About The Role**
 We are seeking a highly skilled Software Development Engineer II (SDE\\-II) to join our dynamic team at JioHotstar. In this role, you will be instrumental in designing, developing, and maintaining high\\-performance microservices that underpin our advertising and content delivery platforms. Your work will directly impact the delivery of personalized, real\\-time advertising experiences to millions of users, supporting live sports, premium entertainment, and targeted content. This position offers an exciting opportunity to operate at the intersection of scale, reliability, and innovation, contributing to the development of scalable backend services that are critical to our platform’s success. The ideal candidate is passionate about building robust systems, enjoys solving complex technical challenges, and thrives in a fast\\-paced, collaborative environment.
   

  

**Qualifications**
 The ideal candidate will possess a strong educational background in computer science or a related field, along with relevant professional experience. A bachelor’s or master’s degree in computer science, software engineering, or equivalent is preferred. Candidates should have 2\\-4 years of experience in backend development, with a proven track record of working on large\\-scale distributed systems. Proficiency in programming languages such as Java, Golang, or Python is essential. Experience with cloud platforms, particularly AWS, along with familiarity with messaging systems like Kafka and CI/CD pipelines, is highly desirable. A solid understanding of database fundamentals, including relational, document, key\\-value, object, or graph databases, is required. The ability to translate ambiguous requirements into scalable technical solutions and strong problem\\-solving skills are critical for success in this role.
   

  

**Responsibilities**
* Design, develop, and maintain robust, secure, and scalable microservices that support JioHotstar’s applications and ad platforms.
* Write clean, efficient, and maintainable code following best practices, including conducting unit testing and participating in code reviews to ensure high code quality.
* Optimize server response times to sub\\-second levels, implementing appropriate data storage solutions such as relational, document, key\\-value, object, or graph databases, along with index stores and messaging systems.
* Take ownership of cloud infrastructure management, including deployment, monitoring, and troubleshooting to ensure high availability and performance.
* Continuously evaluate emerging technologies and contribute to architecture and design discussions to enhance system capabilities and efficiency.
* Collaborate closely with Product Managers and cross\\-functional teams to understand requirements and deliver high\\-quality software solutions aligned with business objectives.
* Mentor junior engineers and interns, sharing knowledge and best practices to foster a collaborative and innovative team environment.


**Benefits**
 JioHotstar offers a comprehensive benefits package designed to support the well\\-being and professional growth of our employees. This includes competitive salary packages, health insurance coverage, and wellness programs. Employees have access to continuous learning opportunities, including training sessions, workshops, and certifications, to enhance their skills and career development. The company promotes a flexible work environment with options for remote work, ensuring a healthy work\\-life balance. Additionally, employees are encouraged to participate in various team\\-building activities and corporate events that foster a collaborative and inclusive culture. JioHotstar values diversity and inclusion, providing a respectful and supportive workplace where every individual can thrive.
   

  

 Equal Opportunity
   

  

 JioHotstar is an equal opportunity employer committed to fostering an inclusive environment for all employees. We do not discriminate based on race, religion, gender, sexual orientation, age, disability, or any other protected characteristic. Our hiring practices are based solely on merit, skills, and qualifications. We believe that diversity drives innovation and creativity, and we are dedicated to creating a workplace where everyone feels valued, respected, and empowered to contribute to our shared success.

title: Software Engineer
description:
**About The Company**
 Arcana is a leading technology company dedicated to developing innovative solutions that transform the financial sector. With a focus on leveraging cutting\\-edge technologies, Arcana strives to create robust, scalable, and reliable systems that empower clients and users worldwide. Our commitment to excellence and continuous innovation has positioned us as a pioneer in fintech, delivering impactful products that meet the evolving needs of the industry. At Arcana, we foster a collaborative and inclusive environment where talented professionals can thrive and contribute to shaping the future of finance technology.
   

  

**About The Role**
 Join our dynamic team at the forefront of cutting\\-edge technology as we seek a SDE2 (Backend). Embark on a journey where your deep\\-rooted expertise in computer science fundamentals, alongside an intricate understanding of data structures, algorithms, and system design, becomes the cornerstone of innovative solutions. This pivotal role not only demands your proficiency in developing and elevating compute and I/O\\-intensive applications but also ensures their peak performance and unwavering reliability.
   

  

 As a Senior Software Development Engineer in our backend team, you will be instrumental in architecting, optimizing, and maintaining high\\-performance systems that support our core financial products. Your work will directly impact the scalability, robustness, and efficiency of our platform, enabling Arcana to deliver seamless experiences to our clients and users worldwide. **Qualifications**
* Bachelor's or Master's degree in Computer Science, Engineering, or a related field.

* Familiarity with database technologies such as Redis, PostgreSQL, and ClickHouse.

* Solid understanding of software development life cycle, continuous integration, and continuous delivery (CI/CD) practices.

**Responsibilities**
* Architect, refine, and escalate the capabilities of complex backend systems using Python, with a focus on efficiency, durability, and scalability.

We do not discriminate based on race, color, religion, gender, gender identity or expression, sexual orientation, national origin, age, disability, or any other legally protected status. title: Software Engineer, Infrastructure
description:
Who We Are
   

  

 Notion is the collaborative AI workspace where teams and agents think together. We're building one place where your knowledge, projects, meetings, and AI tools live side by side, so work is faster, clearer, and less fragmented. Millions of individuals, small teams, and large companies run their work on Notion.
   

  

 Notinos (our employees) are customer zero in bringing this future of work to life. We care about craft, building things that last, and the belief that great work is still fundamentally human. Our goal isn’t to ship the next feature. Each and every team of Notinos is working to set the standard for how humans work together in the AI era. From building a business’s system of record to making and managing AI agents to automating away the busy work, we care deeply about giving our customers more time for their life’s work.
   

  

**About The Role**
 The Hyderabad Infra team builds and maintains Notion's internal async task runner and configuration management platform. The async task runner plays a critical role in ensuring our millions of users have a fast, reliable, and secure experience. The configuration management platform enables safe, explicit configuration management for Notion's product and infrastructure engineers.
   

  

 As part of the Hyderabad Infra Team, you’ll have a unique opportunity to shape how Notion manages and scales its async task runner and configuration management platform, enabling innovation across the company.
   

  

 What You'll Achieve
   

  

* You will contribute to the evolution and maintenance of our async task runner to meet the needs of over 100 million global users and support the rapid growth of our product and business.
* With guidance from senior team members, you'll help ensure our systems remain reliable, efficient, and scalable. You'll evaluate and integrate new technologies to keep us ahead of emerging challenges.
* Your work will empower our engineering team to build features confidently while you grow your skills in distributed systems and infrastructure.
* You will develop the skills and confidence to debug live production systems with minimal disruption, whether replacing components or managing failovers. You will participate in an on\\-call rotation, responding to incidents to uphold service reliability and quickly restore normal operations.
* You will partner with product engineers and other infra teams to ensure our platforms align with evolving business needs and product goals.


 Skills You'll Need to Bring
   

  

* A software developer with at least 4 years of experience and the ability to perform well in a fast\\-paced environment.
* Systems thinker: You understand distributed systems and can design solutions that account for tradeoffs like consistency, latency, and scalability.
* Pragmatic problem\\-solver: You prioritize business impact and understand the balance between craft, speed, and long\\-term maintainability. You’re opinionated but not ideological, and you learn new technologies as you go.
* Ownership and initiative: You thrive in a fast\\-moving, unstructured environment and are comfortable taking ownership of ambiguous problems. You act with a bias toward action and focus on results.
* Customer Empathy: You excel at collaborating across teams, offering guidance and solutions to unblock engineers and support them in building reliable systems. With empathy at the core of your approach, you focus on addressing the needs of those who depend on the async task runner.
* You don’t need to be an AI expert, but you’re curious and willing to adopt AI tools to work smarter and deliver better results.


 By clicking “Submit Application”, I understand and agree that Notion and its affiliates and subsidiaries will collect and process my information in accordance with Notion’s Global Recruiting Privacy Policy.
   

  

 A Note on AI
   

  

 You don’t need deep AI expertise for every role, but we do expect every Notino to be intellectually curious, drawn to tinkering and discovery, and excited to use AI as a real collaborator in their work. For some roles, AI fluency is a core requirement — when that’s the case, we'll say so explicitly in the qualifications. People who thrive here don’t treat AI as a novelty. They use it to think better, and make their work easier for others to build on.
   

  

 Equal Opportunity \\& Accommodations
   

  

 We hire talented people from a wide range of backgrounds. If you’re excited about this role but don’t meet every bullet, we still encourage you to apply. Notion is an equal opportunity employer and does not discriminate on the basis of any legally protected characteristic. Consistent with applicable law, we will consider for employment qualified applicants with arrest and conviction records. Notion provides reasonable accommodations during the application process; if you need one, please let your recruiter know.
   

  

 Notion is proud to be an equal opportunity employer. We do not discriminate in hiring or any employment decision based on race, color, religion, national origin, age, sex (including pregnancy, childbirth, or related medical conditions), marital status, ancestry, physical or mental disability, genetic information, veteran status, gender identity or expression, sexual orientation, or other applicable legally protected characteristic. Notion considers qualified applicants with criminal histories, consistent with applicable federal, state and local law. Notion is also committed to providing reasonable accommodations for qualified individuals with disabilities and disabled veterans in our job application procedures. If you need assistance or an accommodation due to a disability, please let your recruiter know.

 **Super AI Calling Agent**

Super AI Calling agent autonomously answers calls, conducts natural conversations in Indic languages, screens calls, takes messages, and handles tasks using on\\-device Small Language Models (SLMs).
 



  





 This is a
 **hands\\-on technical leadership role** 
 . You will architect, build, and scale native Android and iOS solutions that overcome Android’s RTP audio stream isolation through carrier platform signing and privileged APIs. Eventually you will lead a small, high\\-impact team while writing production code daily.
 



  





 If you have shipped complex telephony/AI voice solutions on mobile and love deep system\\-level integration, this is your chance to build something transformative at scale.
 



  





**Key Responsibilities** 



* **Lead Native Mobile Development:** 
 Architect and implement
 **native Android** 
 (Kotlin) and
 **native iOS** 
 (Swift) versions of SACA, focusing on call integration.
* **Audio Injection \\& Telephony** 
 : Build system\\-level audio routing into active cellular calls (RTP streams) using platform\\-signed APKs, InCallService, ConnectionService, AudioTrack/AudioRecord with VOICE\\_COMMUNICATION, and privileged permissions (MODIFY\\_PHONE\\_STATE, CAPTURE\\_AUDIO\\_OUTPUT, CALL\\_PRIVILEGED).
* **On\\-Device AI Pipeline** 
 : Integrate 3B SLM (Gemma or Similar), Android SpeechRecognizer / iOS Speech, TextToSpeech, and low\\-latency STT/LLM/TTS flows (\\~3\\-5s turn latency).
* **Platform Signing \\& Privileges** 
 : Collaborate with carriers (e.g., Large Telco's) for APK signing, system app status, and hidden APIs (TelecomManager, AudioManager routing, FLAG\\_CALL\\_REDIRECTION).
* **Cross\\-Platform Consistency** 
 : Ensure identical core functionality, performance, and privacy (on\\-device\\-first) across Android 10\\+ and iOS.
* **Scalability \\& Reliability** 
 : Optimize for 4GB\\+ RAM devices, battery, VoLTE/VoWiFi, emergency call bypass, multi\\-device testing (Samsung, Xiaomi, Iphone etc.).
* **Compliance** 
 : Implement consent, AI disclosure, DPDP/privacy, security audits.



  





  




**Must\\-Have Qualifications** 
* **10\\+ years** 
 in mobile development, with
 **strong hands\\-on experience** 
 building production native Android (Kotlin/Java) and iOS (Swift/Objective\\-C) apps.
* **Proven expertise** 
 in
 **telephony and call audio** 
 :
* Android Telecom APIs, InCallService, ConnectionService, RTP stream handling.
* Audio injection/routing into live calls (AudioTrack, AudioManager, VOICE\\_COMMUNICATION).
* Experience with platform certificates, system apps, or privileged permissions is a
 **big plus.**
* Experience integrating
 **on\\-device AI/ML** 
 (LLMs, STT/TTS, llama.cpp, TensorFlow Lite / Core ML).
* Deep understanding of
 **Android security architecture** 
 and carrier integration (VoLTE, platform signing).
* Strong Kotlin, Swift, Gradle, Xcode, Jetpack Compose / SwiftUI.
* Track record shipping high\\-scale consumer apps with low\\-latency audio/voice features.
* Experience with real\\-time audio processing, call state management, and background execution.



  





  




**Nice to Have** 
* Prior work on voice AI assistants, call automation, or telco VAS.
* Experience with carrier partnerships or platform\\-signed apps.
* Knowledge of iOS CallKit and Android equivalents.
* Background in edtech, AI startups, or scaling to millions of users.



  





  




**Why Join ModalX?** 

 ✅
 
 Direct impact on a product reaching 200M\\+ users via Large Telco Partnership.
 




 ✅
 
 Equity in a fast\\-moving AI company (pre\\-seed closed, seed round active).
 




 ✅
 
 Opportunity to build India’s leading voice AI platform.
 




 ✅ Competitive compensation and equity.
 



 ✅ Opportunity to build technology that can impact hundreds of millions of users.
 



  




**How to Apply** 

 Send your resume, GitHub profile, portfolio, and a short note describing a relevant telephony, mobile systems, or AI voice project to:
 



 📧 makarand@modalx.ai
 



  





 Subject Line:
 **Senior Software Engineer – Super AI Call Assistant**

title: Data Engineer
description:
Join us as a

 at Barclays, where you will spearhead the evolution of our data platforms and real\\-time processing capabilities, driving innovation and operational excellence. * Good understanding of data structures and algorithms

**Some Other Highly Valued Skills May Include**
* Experience with IBM MQ or JMS\\-based messaging
* Knowledge of payment processing domain and creation of Data products in a Data mesh space.
* Familiarity with ELK stack for logging and troubleshooting

 The role is based out of
 **Pune** 
 .
   

  

**Purpose of the role**
 To build and maintain the systems that collect, store, process, and analyse data, such as data pipelines, data warehouses and data lakes to ensure that all data is accurate, accessible, and secure.
   

  

**Accountabilities**

**Assistant Vice President Expectations**

Set objectives and coach employees in pursuit of those objectives, appraisal of performance relative to objectives and determination of reward outcomes

The four LEAD behaviours are: L – Listen and be authentic, E – Energise and inspire, A – Align across the enterprise, D – Develop others.

They will identify new directions for assignments and/ or projects, identifying a combination of cross functional methodologies or practices to meet required outcomes.

 All colleagues will be expected to demonstrate the Barclays Values of Respect, Integrity, Service, Excellence and Stewardship – our moral compass, helping us do what we believe is right. They will also be expected to demonstrate the Barclays Mindset – to Empower, Challenge and Drive – the operating manual for how we behave.

title: Team Lead, Core Technology

**About the role \\-\\-** 
 As a Team Lead, Core Technology, you’ll leverage your technical depth and problem\\-solving skills to build reliable, lightweight, high\\-performing web applications and platform services. While your strength is back\\-end development (Python/Django and related frameworks), you’re comfortable collaborating across the stack and are conversant with modern front\\-end ecosystems (React/Angular/Vue).

**Who You Are** 
  

  

  

* 6\\+ years of strong experience in Python, with deep expertise in Django and other frameworks.

* Strong understanding of:
+ HLD/LLD, system design fundamentals, API design, and scalable architectures

* Hands\\-on experience building AI/LLM solutions, including:
+ RAG pipelines and agent workflows

+ Familiarity with AI agent design patterns and best practices
